message:
fix(node): correct epoch-scoped key derivation test expectations

Swap the expected hex digests for epoch 1 and epoch 13 key derivation
tests — the previous values were transposed, causing each test to
assert the hash belonging to the other epoch. The derive_epoch_key
function itself is unchanged; only the test expectations are corrected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
